message:
fix(viewer): improve rustdoc formatting and modernize iterator usage

Reformat doc comments on correlate_histories_with_git_aliases and
build_workspace_id_aliases to use proper rustdoc paragraph breaks
(blank `///` line) instead of continuation lines. Replace one-element
array .into_iter() with std::iter::once() in the alias test fixture.

Update viewer_assets.rs test assertion to match the new
ISSUE_BACKDROP_VIEWS-aware routing logic introduced in the embedded
viewer JS.  All 13 TUI snapshots updated accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
